rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RENNA HOLMES
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Cross-Complaint; Or In The Alt, To Allow Already Filed Cross-Complaint To Stand
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, OCTOBER 30, 2007, LINE 1, DEFENDANTS TOSHIA WEBSTER AND TINA WEBSTER'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Cross-Complaint; Or In The Alternative, To Allow Already Filed Cross-Complaint To Stand. IT APPEARS THAT THIS CASE AND A MOTION TO STRIKE THE CROSS-COMPLAINT ARE PENDING IN THE PROBATE DEPARTMENT. ACCORDINGLY, THIS MOTION IS CONTINUED TO THE PROBATE DEPARTMENT ON NOVEMBER 15, 2007 TO BE HEARD IN CONJUNCTION WITH THE MOTION TO STRIKE. =(302/PJM/VC)
